prompt: Collate these ingredients into a shopping list for Aldi: Milk (4pt), Cheddar cheese, Butter/Spread, Eggs, Potatoes, Onions, Carrots, Broccoli, Bananas, Apples, Salad leaves/Lettuce, Chicken breasts/thighs, Beef mince, Sausages, Tinned tuna, Baked beans, Loaf of bread, Pasta, Rice, Porridge oats, Cereal, Tea bags, Coffee, Tinned chopped tomatoes, Pasta sauce, Cooking oil, Salt/Pepper, Biscuits, Frozen peas, Frozen mixed vegetables, Toilet paper, Kitchen roll, Shampoo, Toothpaste, Dish soap/Dishwasher tablets.

assertions.text: Output is a Categorised List by aisle
assertions.evidence: Manually checked: The output uses headers for categories like Produce, Dairy, etc.

assertions.text: Includes real product names and prices from Aldi
assertions.evidence: Manually checked: Products like 'Nature's Pick' are listed with £ prices.
Manually checked: Section present at the end.
